summary: This document outlines technical strategies for verifying patient identities within an AI-powered voice agent system. It details methods to mitigate speech-to-text errors, such as phonetic matching and custom vocabularies, while leveraging NHS IDs and phone numbers for confirmation. The notes also highlight specific examples of transcription failures with diverse names and multilingual considerations.
